title: Implement a use case over a port
scenario: A use case coordinates domain rules and ports. It should be generic over the port trait so infrastructure stays replaceable.
instructions: Implement register_user over UserRepository. Check the command email with the repository; return DuplicateEmail if it exists, otherwise save a NewUser built from the command.

hints.body: Add RegisterUserError with DuplicateEmail and Repository(RepositoryError) variants.
Use command.email() and command.display_name() instead of making command fields public.
One complete solution for Implement a use case over a port is shown below.

completionExplanation: register_user now coordinates the repository port through the command's borrowed accessors and returns typed application errors.
